content.en:
"What's the solution?"

Ye Tian looked very excited.

Killing Wind suddenly said mysteriously: "Tengfeng, you should know that our Devouring Clan once had many domain ancestors, but those domain ancestors basically left here and went to the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, after all, it is difficult to stay in this realm to continue to improve, it is better to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain and fight." And those domain ancestor-level devouring clans also left good things, which can be regarded as a gift to us devourers. One of the domain ancestors, as you know, is the Wandering Domain Ancestor, he left a world, called the Wandering Realm, and there is a soul stone tablet in it, which is said to be a treasure found by the Wandering Domain Ancestor in the Dark Forbidden Realm, which can refine the soul and the effect is very good. However, if you are not strong-willed, you will be manipulated by that soul stone tablet and become a puppet. At the beginning, when the Ancestor of the Wandering Domain was still there, some Devourers could still refine their souls under his protection, so that they would not be manipulated into puppets. But now, the domain ancestors are gone, and it is too dangerous to enter the soul stone tablet to cultivate, so the Manyao Realm is blocked by those adults, and ordinary people are not allowed to enter!"

"Then I can't get in!"

Ye Tian frowned.

"I have a way to let you in, but I'm afraid you won't dare to go in!" Killing Wind said with a smile.

"What am I afraid of?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay, you go and prepare 3,000 World Origin Crystals, and I'll let you in. But if you think clearly, 3,000 World Origin Crystals are enough to make your strength increase dramatically, and if you use it in exchange for the opportunity to enter the Wandering Realm, you may become a puppet there. "

Killing Wind reminded.

"Give me a moment!"

Ye Tian thought for a while and said.

In an instant, he left the Devouring Realm.

3,000 World Origin Crystals are actually not much, but he has already extracted a small part of the Origin of the Human Realm before, and if he extracts it again, it will undoubtedly cause damage to the Human Realm.

"The human world can't extract the origin, it can only attack the world of other forces!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he can't attack the world of other forces in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, otherwise the half-step domain ancestors will soon find him when they dispatch, and there will be no way to escape when the time comes, because the copied Devouring Clan's body is just an ordinary invincible Dao Ancestor, and his strength is too weak.

"There are a lot of Dao Realms in the Dao Mountain Realm, as long as I don't swallow those Dao Realms, I only devour a small part of the World Origin and leave, so I don't destroy the Dao Realm, and I have obtained a large number of World Origins. Moreover, my main body can cooperate with the replication body to act, and it is difficult for other half-step domain ancestors to find my replication body. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thinking of this, he set to action.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to come to a top-level Dao realm under the command of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple.

There are many Dao Ancestors in this Dao Realm, but they are all relatively weak Dao Ancestors, and the truly powerful Dao Ancestors have already entered the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to cultivate, where will they be sent here!

Ye Tian let his copy body devouring clan enter this Dao Realm, and directly entered the World Origin of the Dao Realm, and began to devour the World Origin.

Bang!!!

The Dao Realm was shaken, and the World Origin rebelled wildly, but it was unable to resist in the face of the Devouring Clan.

However, those Dao Ancestors knew the situation, and immediately notified those Dao Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and then reported it to the Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

Soon, the Half-Step Domain Ancestors traveled to this Dao Realm to capture the Devouring Clan.

And after Ye Tian devoured about one-tenth of the Dao Realm, he immediately left this Dao Realm and headed to the next Dao Realm.

Not long after, the True Martial Palace Lord and the Blue Dragon Palace Master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace came to this Dao Realm, only to find that the Dao Realm was very intact, but only one-tenth of the origin had been lost.

"Strange, why didn't this Devourer Clan devour the Dao Realm?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord was puzzled.

Judging from the reactions of the other Dao Ancestors, that Devouring Clan was at the level of an invincible Dao Ancestor, and it was not difficult to devour a Dao Realm, and it was definitely possible to devour this Dao Realm before they arrived, but now it had only devoured one-tenth of the World Origin.

Soon after, another Dao Realm was devoured by one-tenth of its origin.

In the following days, every once in a while, a Dao Realm Origin was devoured, making the major forces angry.

this day.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace and the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain opened the meeting again.

At the meeting, the Heavenly Punishment Palace Master spoke: "Not long ago, a Devouring Clan frantically devoured the Dao Realm Origin, but it was completely different from the previous Devouring Clan, he did not devour the world, only the Origin. Therefore, he did not devour the world, resulting in the Xuan Turtle Dao Ancestor's Xuan Turtle Shell not being able to function, so he could not lock his position. "

"Did the Devourers know about the situation of the turtle shell?"

The Flame Crack Dao Ancestor spoke.

"No!" the Xuangui Palace Master said: "This matter is only known to those Dao Ancestors who are here, how can the Devouring Clan know? "

"It should be that the Devouring Clan has changed its strategy and no longer devours the world, after all, a world is gone if it is devoured, but if it is devoured little by little, it can be devoured for a long time, and we have to repair the origin of the world in order to maintain the operation of the world!

Jin Chen Daozu said angrily.

Ye Tian looked at the half-step domain ancestors who were discussing, and seemed to have guessed something.

But in fact, where did the Devouring Clan think so much, he did all this, just to collect 3,000 World Origin Crystals.

However, it was better for these half-step domain ancestors to guess wrongly, at least they made him less suspicious.

In the end, these half-step domain ancestors didn't discuss any results, because Ye Tian had already collected enough world origins, there was no need to continue devouring world origins, even if they set a trap, they wouldn't be able to catch Ye Tian.

---------------------

Devouring Realm.

Ye Tian came back here again, bringing 3,000 World Origin Crystals to find the killing wind.

Seeing Ye Tian coming, Killing Feng said with a smile: "Have you collected 3,000 origin crystals?"

"Collected!"

Ye Tian handed 3,000 Origin Crystals to Killing Wind.

"That's right, exactly 3,000 Origin Crystals!" Killing Feng was very satisfied, and immediately said, "Let's go, I'll take you into the Wandering Realm!"

Ye Tian followed the killing wind and left the Devouring Realm and went to a certain place in the Daoshan Realm.

Obviously, the world is somewhere else.

After a while, Killing Wind took Ye Tian to a strange territory.

Abrupt.

Killing Wind took out a black stone tablet and communicated with the Manxiao Realm.

Bang!!!!

A temporary passage appeared, leading to the Wandering Realm.

"Tengfeng boy, be careful, don't really be refined into a puppet. I'll send you in, and if you come out, you won't be restricted, and you will be able to come out easily with your strength!" said Killing Wind.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately entered the passage and entered the Wandering Realm.

What Killing Wind didn't know was that Ye Tian's replica body had taken the risk of bringing all the body, so Killing Wind didn't know that a cultivator had been mixed into the Manyao Realm.
